content.intro: TypeScript is a powerful programming language backed by a large ecosystem. This page highlights some of the most notable open-source repositories built using TypeScript.
common_use_cases: Core backend and infrastructure services utilizing TypeScript's strengths.
Tooling and automation scripts widely adopted by the community.

seo_metadata.title: Top TypeScript GitHub Repositories
seo_metadata.description: Discover amazing TypeScript projects on GitHub. View popular frameworks and libraries.
